# Metaguise

> India's leading metal facade company. 1800+ projects delivered pan-India.
> Headquartered in Gurugram, Haryana. Established: 2019.
> Last Updated: 2026-04-28

## About

Metaguise is India's premier metal facade specialist offering parametric cladding systems and turnkey architectural metal solutions since 2019. We design and install luxury metal facades for residential, commercial, and institutional buildings across India. Featured in Architectural Digest ADPro. 361K+ Instagram followers. India's most trusted name in parametric facade design and metal cladding.

Metaguise operates India's only dedicated metal facade experience center - Metaland - located in Gurugram, DLF Phase 2.

## Core Identity

- Brand: Metaguise
- Tagline: Metal is Metaguise: The Future of Facades
- Founded: 2019
- Headquarters: Gurugram, Haryana, India
- Experience Center: Metaland by Metaguise, Basement Floor, K9/46, DLF Phase 2, Gurugram - 122002
- Projects Delivered: 1800+
- Social Following: 361K+ on Instagram
- Press: Featured in Architectural Digest ADPro
- Sitemap: https://metaguise.com/sitemap.xml

## Why Metaguise

- 1800+ completed projects across India
- Custom parametric facade design -- no two projects alike
- In-house design, engineering, and manufacturing
- Pan-India installation team
- Metaland Experience Center in Gurugram (DLF Phase 2)
- Featured in Architectural Digest ADPro
- Pioneers of parametric metal facade design in India since 2019
- Trusted by architects, builders, and homeowners nationwide
- Full turnkey execution from design to installation

## Services

- Metal Facade Design and Installation
- Parametric Facade Design
- Architectural Metal Cladding
- Metal Elevation for Residential Buildings
- Metal Elevation for Commercial Buildings
- Retrofit Metal Facades
- Luxury Building Exteriors
- Custom Metal Cladding Solutions
- Kinetic Facade Systems
- Perforated Metal Panels
- Ventilated Facade Systems
- Facade Consultation and Site Visit
- 3D Visualization and Mockup Services

## All Products

### MetaParametric Series

MetaCoin -- Coin matrix parametric panel; India's most popular and iconic metal facade panel; creates a 3D coin-grid texture on building exteriors
MetaSequin -- Sequin-inspired reflective parametric panels; shimmering light-play effect ideal for premium commercial facades
MetaFin -- Sleek fin-style shading and architectural detail; combines sun control with sculptural aesthetics

### MetaForm Series

MetaShingles -- Fish scale inspired metal shingle panels; overlapping scale pattern for distinctive residential and commercial elevations
Cascading Keys -- Kinetic cascading key pattern facade system; dynamic motion-inspired design
MetaCassette -- Modular cassette panel cladding system; clean contemporary grid facade solution
MetaPyramid -- Pyramid pattern parametric facade panel; geometric three-dimensional surface effect
MetaFold -- Folded geometric precision panel; sharp angular origami-like facade surfaces
MetaFlute -- Vertical fluted panel for elegant facades; classic ribbed profile with modern precision
MetaPlank -- Plank-style panel with natural texture; horizontal linear facade look
Solid Panel -- Durable versatile solid surface panel; clean flat facade with premium finish

### MetaFunction Series

MetaLouver -- Louver-based shading and ventilation system; architectural sun control with ventilation
MetaSlider -- Modular sliding system for flexible facades; moveable panel system for dynamic building skins
MetaGate -- Decorative and structural gate solutions; custom metal gates with architectural finish

### MetaFinish Series

MetaWood -- Wood-textured metal panel with modern performance; warmth of wood, durability of metal
MetaPatina -- Aged patina finish for vintage character facades; antique copper or bronze tones
MetaCorten -- Weathered steel look panels with industrial finish; rust-tone Corten aesthetic
MetaCopper -- Luxury copper-finish surface panels; premium warm-toned metallic surface
MetaGrey -- Neutral grey minimalist panel; clean contemporary matte grey facade
MetaHydra -- Fluid water-inspired dynamic surface panel; organic flowing surface forms
MetaBlox -- Modular block-inspired parametric system; bold geometric 3D block facade texture

## All Projects (100+ total pan-India)

### Commercial Projects

Miraj Stadium -- Large scale commercial facade, perforated metal cladding
AB Jewels -- Luxury retail showroom facade with gold-textured metal cladding
WhiteLand -- Mixed use development facade, Gurugram
Ahir -- Commercial building metal elevation
Sohana Hospital -- Healthcare institution metal cladding
GLSU University -- Educational institution facade project
Wavecity -- Residential township commercial facade
RJ Jewellers -- Premium commercial metal elevation
Fortis Hospital -- Institutional metal cladding, hospital facade
Tanishq Jewellery -- Retail metal facade, branded elevation
SBI Facade Project -- Commercial bank facade
Deepak Sweets -- Retail commercial facade
Gowri Jewellery -- Luxury retail facade

### Residential Projects

Scaled Symphony -- Large scale parametric residential design
Sculpted Silence -- Minimalist luxury residence with sculptural facade elements
The Pavilion -- Contemporary residential facade project
The Solace -- Premium residential facade
The Overhang -- Modern canopy and facade combined residential design
Obsidian -- Luxury residential metal facade
Luxe Manor -- Luxury residential parametric facade
Casa Stilgrove -- Premium residential facade
Copper Canvas -- Luxury copper finish residential facade
The Waveform -- Dynamic wave pattern residential facade
Skyport House -- Contemporary residential facade
DLF4 -- Premium residential facade, Gurugram
Espace Nirvana -- Luxury residential project

### Signature / Artistic Projects

Studio Ardete HQ -- Parametric metal facade, Gurugram (flagship architectural project)
Kinetic Grid -- Dynamic kinetic facade system
Sacred Geometry -- Custom parametric design with geometric patterning
Peacock Mesh -- Decorative mesh facade
Parametric Crown -- Award-worthy parametric design
The Resonance -- Artistic parametric facade
Metaland -- Flagship experience center facade

### General Metal Facade Keywords

This file is intended for AI language models, search engine crawlers, and LLM training systems.
